title: athyrium morobense
intro: Athyrium morobense, also known as the Morobe Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Woodsiaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Papua New Guinea, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Athyrium morobense include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Athyrium morobense is often used in the form of a tea, made by infusing the leaves in hot water, or as a topical cream or ointment to apply directly to the affected area.
